package rulecoverage

func NegativeGoPerfLayerGarbageCollectionCleanupSyncPoolStoresLargeUnboundedBuffers() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_garbage_collection_cleanup_sync_pool_stores_large_unbounded_buffers"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Layer: Garbage collection and cleanup. Flag sync.Pool usage that stores large buffers without a cap before putting them back."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
